allow: Bash(Rscript -e 'suppressMessages\(library\(wehoop\)\); df <- wehoop::load_wnba_player_box\(seasons=2025L\); cols <- names\(df\); cat\(grep\("team|opponent|minutes", cols, value=TRUE, ignore.case=TRUE\), sep="\\n"\)')

PowerShell(cd "G:/My Drive/Scripting Projects/wnba_project"; Rscript -e "suppressMessages\(library\(wehoop\)\); df <- wehoop::load_wnba_player_box\(seasons=2025L\); cat\('class:', class\(df$minutes\), '\\n'\); print\(head\(df$minutes, 20\)\); cat\('any NA after as.numeric:', sum\(is.na\(suppressWarnings\(as.numeric\(df$minutes\)\)\)\), 'of', nrow\(df\), '\\n'\)" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 60)

PowerShell(cd "G:/My Drive/Scripting Projects/wnba_project"; Rscript -e "suppressMessages\(library\(wehoop\)\); df <- wehoop::load_wnba_player_box\(seasons=2025L\); cat\('nrow:', nrow\(df\), '\\n'\); print\(head\(unique\(df$team_display_name\), 5\)\); print\(head\(unique\(df$opponent_team_display_name\), 5\)\); cat\('any NA opponent:', sum\(is.na\(df$opponent_team_display_name\)\), '\\n'\); cat\('any NA game_id:', sum\(is.na\(df$game_id\)\), 'any NA player:', sum\(is.na\(df$athlete_display_name\)\), '\\n'\)" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 30)
